testcase.name: test_move_single_item_between_accounts

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 2 == 1 + where 2 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff0a7f8cc3c0>('items_moved') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff0a7f8cc3c0> = {'items_moved': 2, 'ok': True, 'source_order_id': 'd4ecda98-af99-4379-be43-7da0042bbdd8', 'target_order_id': '786cad00-fdbe-42ec-9e06-7ba520d06217'}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_move_items.py:181: in test_move_single_item_between_accounts assert result.get("items_moved") == 1 E AssertionError: assert 2 == 1 E + where 2 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff0a7f8cc3c0>('items_moved') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff0a7f8cc3c0> = {'items_moved': 2, 'ok': True, 'source_order_id': 'd4ecda98-af99-4379-be43-7da0042bbdd8', 'target_order_id': '786cad00-fdbe-42ec-9e06-7ba520d06217'}.get
